question: Will Elon Musk become a trillionaire before July 2026?
reason: Elon Musk's net worth is below $1 trillion as of May 27, 2026.
evidence: As of May 20, 2026, Bloomberg estimates Musk's net worth at $676 billion. ([bloomberg.com](https://www.bloomberg.com/billionaires/?utm_source=openai))
Forbes reports Musk's net worth at $837.2 billion as of May 27, 2026. ([forbes.com](https://www.forbes.com/profile/elon-musk/?utm_source=openai))

SpaceX's IPO, expected in June 2026, is projected to value the company between $1.75 and $2 trillion, potentially increasing Musk's wealth. ([lemonde.fr](https://www.lemonde.fr/en/economy/article/2026/05/21/with-spacex-elon-musk-launches-the-most-spectacular-ipo-ever_6753682_19.html?utm_source=openai))
